subject: fix(pwa): warn when HTML rewrite finds 0 matches despite hashed icons
body:
Surface pass (session meta-sweep) flagged an asymmetry: cold added
fail-loud for SW literal mismatches, but HTML rewrite still silently
skipped when React render format drifts (single quotes, attribute
reorder, self-closing variants). The failure would surface weeks later
when an icon changes and stops refreshing.

Warn-loud rather than fail-loud because a route-only build with no icon
links would legitimately hit zero replacements — don't break those
builds, but make the format-drift case loud for humans to notice.

Tags: pwa, build, fix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-polish
Semver: patch
